title: Hansel and Gretel (At the Gingerbread House)
summary: The witch's deceptively kind invitation - sweet voice with a sinister edge.
prompt: "Why, what dear little children!" cried the old woman, leaning out of the gingerbread doorway. Her voice was as sweet as the sugar on her windowsills. "You must be so very tired and so very hungry. Come in, come in! There is milk, and pancakes with apple, and sugar, and nuts. Come and rest by the warm fire. No harm shall come to you here - none at all."
